name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: We are so darn close
body:
Team -
We are so close to making history. Our campaign set a goal of 2,000,000 individual contributions by midnight tonight -- something no other presidential challenger has done at this point in the race.
[**Look how close we are! Contribute $3 and we will accomplish this historic goal together.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b81a/1298351906/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151216pm")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b81a/1298351906/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151216pm")
This goal is important because every single contribution our campaign receives is a declaration of support for our shared values and sends a powerful message that we are capable of defeating the billionaire class in this election.
[**Help us reach our goal to show you stand with Bernie -- make a $3 contribution now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b81a/1298351906/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151216pm")
Thank you for all of your support.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b81a/1298351906/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151216pm")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b81b/1298351906/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b818/1298351906/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b819/1298351906/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2997/43f17890/4dc71410/6211b806/1298351906/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: survey@boldpac.com
subject: last night's GOP absurdity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
**Folks, were you watching the GOP debate last night? Here 's just _some_ of the absurdity we heard:** | | [](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c4d/3126609321/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.16_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S3_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")
---
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c4d/3126609321/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.16_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S3_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c4d/3126609321/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.16_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S3_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")
It's clear the 2016 elections will be a turning point for our country. With the GOP candidates growing increasingly unhinged, it's _more important than ever_ that we make sure we are prepared.

[That's why we need your input today to help form our 2016 strategy. Please take a minute to fill out our BOLD Election Survey today:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c4d/3126609321/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.16_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S3_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Election-Survey**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c4d/3126609321/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/election-survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.16_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S3_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Thanks for standing strong,

_BOLD PAC_

|

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c52/3126609321/VEsA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c52/3126609321/VEsB/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c53/3126609321/VEsO/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea743/e60883a/70307b75/14423c53/3126609321/VEsP/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Rand Paul
subject: What the media won't tell you [polls]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

I know the media has their own narrative
they're trying to force-feed the American people after Tuesday
night's debate.

After all, they know this was by far the most
important debate of 2015 by far.

But my strong finish in post-debate polling
should tell them something MAJOR is going on.

According to a Washington Times poll, 53% of
respondents thought I won the debate. According to Pew Research,
I had the highest positive viewer reaction of all candidates.

Not only that, but in online polls, I
finished second in CNN's, second in Time's, and third on
DrudgeReport's.

Patriot, it's clear my campaign has a winning
message.

So will you please agree to your most
generous contribution to my campaign's post-debate Money Bomb
right away to help me bring my message straight to the
early-state primary voters?

We're trying to raise $200,000 by tonight.
Time is running out.

With many Americans turning their attention
to the holidays, I'm afraid we have less than 24 hours left to
ensure my campaign's sudden surge is the talk of family dinner
tables in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and
Nevada.

With your support, I do believe my campaign
is poised for a surge. And my strong debate performances are only
part of the reason why.

While other candidates' media-dependent
campaigns are destined to crumble, my campaign has been building
for the long haul.

We have more than 400 fully operational
grassroots organizations across the country. My campaign and
related entities have raised over $22 million.

We're active in every state in the country.

Thanks to your support, we've built the
foundation needed to win . . .

Now, I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE support
to help me rise to the top and raise 200k in today!

So please agree to your most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is-cHrDyNc

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os-cHrDyNc

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Let's show them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

There are only 46 days till the Iowa Caucus.

Only 55 from the New Hampshire primary.

Only 28 days from the next debate.

And less than 24 hours to make a huge
impression.

Yesterday, I asked you to help us reach the
100,000 mark on our 48-hour debate victory moneybomb and you
pulled through.

We reached the halfway mark!

But we're still far from reaching our
$200,000 goal.

Could you help us prove to everyone that Rand
won the debate on Tuesday by donating to our Money Bomb today?

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Your support means more now than ever.

If we can keep this post-debate momentum
going, even more people will have a chance to realize Rand is the
ONE candidate who voters can trust to restore the freedom and
prosperity that should be every American's birthright.

Those are principles worth standing behind.

Let's show them how strong this campaign is.

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Tyler
subject: Hey
body:
Peter, I've been asked to pull together a team of our top grassroots leaders. In just over four short weeks...
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed453b2954ee9b8c39e1c0e1704b42dd15c49de499e4fb95e81765ed479204cf5fb7d)

---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

I need a team of our top grassroots leaders to commit to a crucial mission. In just over two weeks the General Assembly will begin it's 2016 legislative session, and it's up to us to make sure they focus on passing good reforms, not Governor McAuliffe's big-government agenda. Our 2016 Virginia Lobby Day is your opportunity to tell your lawmakers to say no to Medicaid expansion and other big government schemes. Will you help me? I'll provide transportation and food, we just need your voice!**[Americans for Prosperity 2016 Virginia Lobby Day](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed4537ad9dabe84f9692a6234be90faeb7d419aaef3db6ab44b6c92331d3076ef31e9 "Americans for Prosperity 2016 Virginia Lobby Day")** Virginia State Capitol
**Monday, January 18th ** _Breakfast, lunch, dinner, training, and bus transportation provided!
_******All expenses are covered, but please[RSVP asap!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed453114b0376e19fea950358df41d2ffaa125bcf26b4d8219cdd8246ec30f695363f "RSVP asap!")**We need as many people as possible to commit before Christmas. I've been told we need at least 200 citizen advocates in order to send a message that taxpayers are paying attention and counter Governor McAuliffe's agenda. Will you join us?Don't worry if you are inexperienced - we will train you how to be an effective grassroots advocate with your lawmakers. We will also set up the meetings so all you have to do is show up and talk about your support for lower taxes.Will you join the team?Sincerely,Tyler Foote
VA State Director
Americans for Prosperity
---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed45309bb15ff6f886859ff8e1014a0b3d15070903d1ac54d164d64f3c9d5752f85b4 "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")
---
| |

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed4535ed5dd7940369b242cdb74b2fb479ae814b9460fc361396a37e578819300b078) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 1310 N. Courthouse Rd., Ste. 700 Arlington, Virginia 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed453a55b98c1b30ab4d774ceb26448b765dc4e0803e0621eef8d2ad8c159ebc3f901) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=00d9999c075ed4538e7f4067e456353eaea3df3bde70f99d678ba5ea36d33a95d58a69b8281c68f9)******
---

name: Kevin Bingle, Digital Director
subject: Download our mobile app
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, we're excited to announce the launch of our new mobile campaign app, available for FREE in the Apple and Google Play store.

**Get started at:[JohnKasich.com/App](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32335889:WKc-wDyxN:m:1:958431888:2992F846EB21FFE41C9A0BA46CFD7554:r)
or
Simply search on the store for "John Kasich 2016"**
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32335889:WKc-wDyxN:m:1:958431888:2992F846EB21FFE41C9A0BA46CFD7554:r)
This mobile app is designed to give you exclusive campaign updates, provide a tool to share information about John Kasich and to make it easier for supporters to sign-up or donate.
**[Please take a moment to download the"John Kasich 2016" mobile app right now!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32335889:WKc-wDyxN:m:1:958431888:2992F846EB21FFE41C9A0BA46CFD7554:r)**

Thank you for all you're doing to support Gov. John Kasich!
**Kevin Bingle**
Digital Director
[ JohnKasich.com

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32335890:WKc-wDyxN:m:1:958431888:2992F846EB21FFE41C9A0BA46CFD7554:r)P.S. In case you missed it, we also launched a new grassroots program called "Captains for Kasich" \- designed to award points for actions supporting the campaign that can be redeemed for campaign gear like stickers, hats, shirts and a #TeamKasich fleece! Get started today at: [Captains.JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/32335891:WKc-wDyxN:m:1:958431888:2992F846EB21FFE41C9A0BA46CFD7554:r)

In case you missed it, we also launched a new grassroots program called "Captains for Kasich" \- designed to award points for actions supporting the campaign that can be redeemed for campaign gear like stickers, hats, shirts and a #TeamKasich fleece! Get started today at: Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. name: Rand Paul
subject: I've gotta be quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
We're only $80,000 away from hitting our
$200,000 goal!
We're running out of time!
So can I count on you to dig deep with your
most generous contribution of $50, $25, $10 -- or even more --
right away?

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

My opponents continue to argue for more
government spending, more boots on the ground in the Middle East
and more spying on law-abiding American citizens, all while
leaving our borders wide open and refusing to seriously look at
who we're allowing into our country!
It makes no sense. It's madness.
Yet, virtually no one has the guts to stand
up and say it!
With over $18 TRILLION in debt and little to
show after years of BOTH parties' misguided foreign policy
"consensus," we need a President who will tell the American
people the truth that we can have both liberty and security.
Americans who hear my message agree. In
fact, 53% of Washington Times respondents said they thought I won
the debate!
This is great news!
As the last Republican debate of 2015,
Tuesday's showdown in Nevada was by far the most important of the
year.
With your generous financial support, I'm
confident I can ensure my message of liberty spreads all over
early primary states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and
Nevada in the critical days left before the holidays.
Patriot, I want my campaign to be the talk
around family dinner tables in these critical early-voting
states.
But I'm counting on you to ensure that
happens.
Will you please help me reach this critical
$200,000 fundraising goal right away?
Your support will make all the difference!
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Katie emailed you a few days ago about our big mid-month fundraising deadline. **We 've been checking the numbers continuously though, and the flat out truth is that we're falling dangerously short.** If we don't pump the gas in the next few hours, there's no telling what kind of shape we'll be in going into the new year.

**[Contribute to Katie's campaign before midnight tonight to make sure we don't fall behind.](https://act.myngp.com/el/155466653495197696/6259461422812495872?refcode=e20151217&refcode2=e20151217nd&amount=10)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/155466653495197696/6259461422812495872?refcode=e20151217&refcode2=e20151217nd&amount=10)
---

This is no game. We've got all kinds of decisions to make about the campaign's operations in 2016, and those decisions are based 100% on whether we have the funds to actually execute our plans for getting our message out and reminding voters of the huge stakes in this election.

**We 're 28 donors away from our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need your help to make absolutely sure we hit it.**

**[It's not too late -- If you contribute before midnight tonight, we can keep this campaign on track and set ourselves up for the big win in 2016.](https://act.myngp.com/el/155466653495197696/6259461422812495872?refcode=e20151217&refcode2=e20151217nd&amount=10)**

Thanks,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/155466653495197696/6259461422812495872?refcode=e20151217&refcode2=e20151217nd&amount=10)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/155466653495197696/6187403828774567936).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Eric Greitens
subject: We’re Winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
|
---
Peter, Three things:

1) We're sticking to our plan and it's working
2) We're under attack
3) We're winning

In the last month, an out-of-state SuperPAC connected to one of my Republican opponents and the Democrat party has launched relentless false attacks. What they don't understand: their political games motivate me, and they inspire our whole team. While our opponents are spending their time and money attacking us, we are building a grassroots army to move Missouri forward. We are out-organizing and out-raising them, and bringing new people on board for our mission every day.

I believe that politics should be an honorable calling that citizen leaders engage in for a short time. These recent attacks are another example of why people have so little trust in politics and in our government. Take a look at the attacks [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45435511:6DHN30LBN:m:1:1652969985:99D454EB20CD3ABD670C60C968D38068:r) \- you can see why they motivate me and all of our supporters to fight harder every day. The attacks have inspired thousands of people to sign up to invest and volunteer. You can join us: [https://ericgreitens.nationbuilder.com/help-us-fight-back](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45435512:6DHN30LBN:m:1:1652969985:99D454EB20CD3ABD670C60C968D38068:r)

I'm new to politics, but I've been in a lot of fights - in the boxing ring, in Navy SEAL training, and in war zones. Where I come from, if you throw a punch, you own up to it. You don't hide behind others to do your fighting for you. Hiding behind others and refusing to take responsibility isn't leadership. It's cowardice. And it's the last thing we need in Jefferson City.

The day I launched this campaign, I made you this promise: If we meet their corruption with our courage, we will win. Today that is as true as ever.

Stay strong, have courage, and keep the faith. We're winning, and we're also having **a ton of fun.**

Have a great one,

Eric
---
| | | | |
---|---|---|---|---
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

name: Adam Parkhomenko, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Join the party:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Saturday: Come watch the debate! | Friend --

Team Hillary is gearing up for the third Democratic debate on Saturday by throwing watch parties in communities all across the country. There’s one going on near you -- I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the chance to RSVP.

Watch parties are fun, easy, and you’ll get a chance to talk shop with other Hillary supporters. Are you in?

**[Here are the details:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**WHAT:** Hillary for America - D.C. Debate Watch Event with City Council Member Brianne Nadeau
**WHEN:** Saturday, December 19th, 2015
08:00 pm - 11:00 pm
**WHERE:** 1620 I Street, NW
Washington, District of Columbia 20006

**[Yes, I'll be there.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[I can't make it, but keep me in the loop!* ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
One of my favorite things about being a part of this campaign is learning why different people are on Team Hillary. Everyone has a reason they’re here, working hard to make sure Hillary is our next president, and hearing people talk about why they’re with her is inspiring.

**You should go meet folks in your community and learn their stories, too. Prepare to be moved not just by Hillary’s performance, but also by the people on this team with you.**

| [ | [**Reserve your spot**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks,

Adam

Adam Parkhomenko
Director of Grassroots Engagement
Hillary for America

***Message & data rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. ** | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQyNzE3MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxODA4MDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: Almost there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
Rand's debate performance on Tuesday was, in
one word, epic.
It's undeniable.
The headlines, the polls, and now the
donations are all saying the same thing: Rand is the winner.
I couldn't agree with them more.
To celebrate Rand's victory on Tuesday, we
launched a moneybomb with a goal of raising $200,000 in 48 hours.
We're almost there, but we only have a few
more hours to make it.
Will you help us go all the way by donating
$25, $50, or $75 today?

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

I know Rand will be so excited to see the
support flooding in after the debate win and I'll be excited to
show the mainstream media that they cannot silence this movement.

Rand is here to stay and he's here to win.
The debate victory helped us prove it -- and
this successful moneybomb will help us prove it again.
Stand with Rand today.

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What's next for us in Maryland
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I am very, very proud to tell you this: as of last night, our supporters have made more than 2 million contributions to our campaign. Thank you.
What our vision of a political revolution has already accomplished is to show that **we can run a strong and winning campaign** without a super PAC and without relying on contributions from millionaires and billionaires.
In American politics, there are two primary sources of power: organized people and organized money. Last night proved that we have the financial strength to compete against the billionaire class. The next step is proving our organizational strength in order to win.
**In the coming days, our supporters will host debate watch parties in Silver Spring. Can you join them, team?**
# **Saturday: Attend a Debate Watch Party**
**Host: **Fellow supporter in Silver Spring
**What:** SILVER SPRING DEBATE WATCH PARTY AT THE SOLAIRE BUILDING
**Where:** Solaire Building's Club Room
Solaire Building 1150 Ripley Street, Silver Spring, MD 20910
Silver Spring, MD 20910
**When:** Saturday, December 19th
7:00 pm EST
**[Yes, I'll be there.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vsw4)**
**[Click here for more info or to RSVP»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vsw4)**
You can't level the playing field with Wall Street banks and billionaires by taking their money. And we cannot win against the interests of the billionaire class without getting organized in our communities.
We look forward to having you be a part of our movement this weekend. Thank you for everything you do to support our campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb298f/43f17890/4a3bc86a/62115780/2142983740/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb151217-attend-dwp")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb298f/43f17890/4a3bc86a/62115781/2142983740/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb298f/43f17890/4a3bc86a/6211578e/2142983740/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb298f/43f17890/4a3bc86a/6211578f/2142983740/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb298f/43f17890/4a3bc86a/6211578c/2142983740/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
